scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -n ui,server,agent -c cyan,green,magenta "pnpm dev:frontend" "pnpm dev:server" "pnpm dev:agent"
scripts.dev:server: cd server && cross-env SUGGESTIONS_ENABLED=true go run github.com/air-verse/air@latest
scripts.ui:dev:backend: concurrently -n ui,server,agent -c cyan,green,magenta "pnpm ui:dev" "pnpm dev:server" "pnpm dev:agent"
scripts.test:unit: concurrently "pnpm test:server:unit" "pnpm test:proxy:unit" "pnpm test:agent-go:unit" "pnpm test:watcher" "pnpm test:ui"
scripts.test:server:unit: cd server && go test -v $(go list ./... | grep -v /integration)
scripts.test:proxy:unit: cd proxy && go test -v $(go list ./... | grep -v /integration)
scripts.test:agent-go:unit: cd agent-go && go test -tags mcp_go_client_oauth -v $(go list ./... | grep -v /integration)
scripts.check: pnpm check:frontend && pnpm check:package-json && pnpm check:backend && pnpm check:workflows && pnpm check:shell
scripts.check:fix: pnpm check:frontend:fix && pnpm check:package-json:fix && pnpm check:backend:fix && pnpm check:workflows:fix && pnpm check:shell
scripts.check:shell: case "$(uname -s)" in MINGW*|MSYS*) echo 'Skipping shellcheck on Windows'; exit 0;; esac && find . -name '*.sh' -not -path './node_modules/*' -not -path './.git/*' -exec shellcheck {} +
scripts.check:backend: cd server && go tool golangci-lint run && cd ../proxy && go tool golangci-lint run && cd ../agent-go && go tool golangci-lint run --build-tags mcp_go_client_oauth && cd ../authservice && go tool golangci-lint run
scripts.check:backend:fix: cd server && go tool golangci-lint run --fix && cd ../proxy && go tool golangci-lint run --fix && cd ../agent-go && go tool golangci-lint run --fix --build-tags mcp_go_client_oauth && cd ../authservice && go tool golangci-lint run --fix
scripts.ci: pnpm check && pnpm test:unit && ([ "$CI" = "true" ] && pnpm build:frontend && git diff --exit-code || true)
